title: Detecting Access Token Manipulation Attacks
html:
Detecting Access Token Manipulation Attacks

Enumerate processes running in each session.

C:\Tools\SysinternalsSuite\logonsessions64.exe -p

Token enumeration.

C:\tools\token-enumeration.exe

Enabling privileges.

C:\Tools\Tokenvator.exe

Enables the SeBackupPrivilege through Tokenvator.exe.

Enable_Privilege /Privilege:SeBackupPrivilege

Display the type information for the EPROCESS structure in WinDbg.

dt nt!_EPROCESS

Display the layout and members of the _PS_PROTECTION structure in WinDbg.

dt nt!_PS_PROTECTION

Display the information about the _PS_PROTECTED_TYPE structure in WinDbg.

dt nt!_PS_PROTECTED_TYPE

Display the signer of a protected process in WinDbg.

dt nt!_PS_PROTECTED_SIGNER

Inspecting a running process in WinDbg.

!process 0 0 <process>.exe

Displays the contents of the _SECURITY_DESCRIPTOR structure in WinDbg.

dt nt!_SECURITY_DESCRIPTOR

Installs the NTObjectManager PowerShell module.

Install-Module NTObjectManager

Open Token Viewer.

Show-NtToken -All

Retrieves the privileges of a token.

Get-NtTokenPrivilege

Retrieves the token information of a target process.

Get-NtToken -ProcessId 2144
